body.docName: 单据发票批量下载——发起下载任务
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport 
 ## 接口描述 
此接口用于发起下载任务，下载结果通过回调接口获取,最大支持发起50条单据的下载任务。

关联接口使用说明：
1.使用接口/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport发起下载任务，返回批次号；
2. 根据改批次号可以调用接口/v1/invoice/queryProcess查询该批次每个单据的下载进度（下载中或者已完成）；
3. 下载完成的单据可以通过接口/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice 下载对应的压缩文件。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E6%95%B0%E7%BB%84%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A50%E4%B8%AA%0A%5B2021063000806212%5D%20%20","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"restart","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E9%87%8D%E5%90%AF%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%97%B6%E5%86%8D%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E8%AF%B7%E5%8B%BF%E6%90%BA%E5%B8%A6","exampleValue":"false"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"detail","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%98%BE%E7%A4%BA%E5%A2%9E%E5%80%BC%E7%A8%8E%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86","maxLength":"1","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E7%9A%84excel%E4%BC%9A%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84sheet"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"callbackUrl","maxLength":"150","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","desc":"%20%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E7%BA%A7%E6%9C%80%E9%AB%98%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%A6%E5%88%99%E5%8F%96%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"option","maxLength":"1","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%85%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%EF%BC%9B%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA2%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%92%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E3%80%82","exampleValue":"1"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"data","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","desc":"%20%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"121331313"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
` {BaseURL}/api/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport?OPAUID=XFT00001`
```json
[2021000000000000]
```

###返回示例
```json
{
 "success": true,
 "message": "调用成功！",
 "data":121331313
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述** | **备注** |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------------------|
| 200 | 成功 | 无 |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport

接口描述

此接口用于发起下载任务，下载结果通过回调接口获取,最大支持发起50条单据的下载任务。

关联接口使用说明： 1.使用接口/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport发起下载任务，返回批次号； 2. 根据改批次号可以调用接口/v1/invoice/queryProcess查询该批次每个单据的下载进度（下载中或者已完成）； 3. 下载完成的单据可以通过接口/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice 下载对应的压缩文件。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%0A%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E6%95%B0%E7%BB%84%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A50%E4%B8%AA%0A%5B2021063000806212%5D%20%20","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"restart","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E9%87%8D%E5%90%AF%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%97%B6%E5%86%8D%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E8%AF%B7%E5%8B%BF%E6%90%BA%E5%B8%A6","exampleValue":"false"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"detail","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%98%BE%E7%A4%BA%E5%A2%9E%E5%80%BC%E7%A8%8E%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86","maxLength":"1","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E7%9A%84excel%E4%BC%9A%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84sheet"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"callbackUrl","maxLength":"150","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","desc":"%20%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E7%BA%A7%E6%9C%80%E9%AB%98%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%A6%E5%88%99%E5%8F%96%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"option","maxLength":"1","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%85%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%EF%BC%9B%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA2%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%92%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E3%80%82","exampleValue":"1"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"data","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","desc":"%20%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"121331313"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport?OPAUID=XFT00001

[2021000000000000]

###返回示例

{
 "success": true,
 "message": "调用成功！",
 "data":121331313
}

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
